title: Codes for "The Dual Nature of RNA Ligation and Degradation by T4 RNA ligase 1: Insights into an AMP-driven, Nucleobase-dependent Reverse Reaction"
author: Abe, Ryoji
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This Zenodo record provides the source code for stochastic simulations of Rnl1-mediated RNA cleavage and re-ligation using the Gillespie algorithm. The model represents RNA species by length and 5′-end state (e.g., 5′-FAM–labeled, 5′-phosphorylated, 5′-adenylated, and 5′-OH) and implements degradation and ligation as probabilistic reaction events. Users can select and run any of three built-in mechanistic modes (nonprocessive exo, processive exo, and endo) to generate time-resolved product distributions.
steps_raw: This Zenodo record provides the source code for stochastic simulations of Rnl1-mediated RNA cleavage and re-ligation using the Gillespie algorithm. Users can select and run any of three built-in mechanistic modes (nonprocessive exo, processive exo, and endo) to generate time-resolved product distributions.
